---
title: "Cruchley\'s new and improved school Atlas"
---

## Cruchley\'s new and improved school Atlas

**Author:** G.F. Cruchley
**Date:** 1842
**Imprint:** London: Cruchley

### Notes

Later editions were sometimes entitled \'Cruchley\'s Progressive Maps\'.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
